thag2.24:1.1: What needs to be done with firm persistence,
thag2.24:1.2: what needs to be done by one who hopes for awakening,
thag2.24:1.3:
that I will do.
I will not fail.
thag2.24:2.2: the straight, the plunge into deathlessness.
thag2.24:2.3: I, through sagacity, will reach it, know it,
thag2.24:2.4: as the stream of the Ganges, the sea.
